summary: Work Readiness System testing completed. Fixed bug where nmc_registration was incorrectly included in WORK_READY_REQUIREMENTS for all roles (should only be for nurses). All 12 backend tests pass. Frontend UI verified: Work Ready badges display correctly on employees list, Work Readiness Alert Panel shows on What's Needed tab with weighted compliance score and missing items list.
passed_tests: ✅ Login as admin@osabea.care/admin123 via Staff Login - SUCCESS
✅ Navigate to Employees list - Work Ready column displayed - SUCCESS
✅ Olakunle Alonge shows 'Work Ready' badge (green with shield icon) - SUCCESS
✅ Lawrence Egbeni shows 'Not Ready' badge (red with warning icon) - SUCCESS
✅ Olakunle profile - What's Needed tab shows Work Readiness Alert Panel with 'Work Ready' status - SUCCESS
✅ Olakunle weighted compliance score shows 86% - SUCCESS
✅ Priority badges appear on requirements (red 'Required' badge on mandatory items) - SUCCESS
✅ Mandatory items show '⚠ Required before employee can start work' hint - SUCCESS
✅ Lawrence profile - Work Readiness Alert Panel shows 'Not Ready' status - SUCCESS
✅ Lawrence missing mandatory items displayed: Right to Work Documents, Right to Work Verification, Identity Documents, DBS Certificate, DBS Update Service Check, Safeguarding Training - SUCCESS
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug: nmc_registration was incorrectly included in WORK_READY_REQUIREMENTS base set. It should only be added for nurses via get_work_ready_items_for_role(). This caused non-nurse employees to show 'Almost Ready' instead of 'Work Ready' even when all their mandatory items were verified.
seed_data_creation: Used existing data - Olakunle Alonge (OCS-0001) with all mandatory items verified, Lawrence Egbeni (OCS-0002) with missing mandatory items
context_for_next_testing_agent: Work Readiness system fully implemented and tested. Key features: (1) Work Ready badges on employees list showing status (Work Ready/Almost Ready/Not Ready), (2) Work Readiness Alert Panel on What's Needed tab showing status, weighted score, and missing items, (3) Priority badges (Required/Soon) on each requirement row, (4) Weighted compliance scoring (80% mandatory, 15% required_soon, 5% secondary). Bug fixed: nmc_registration removed from base WORK_READY_REQUIREMENTS - it's now only added for nurses.

bug_fix_applied.issue: Non-nurse employees showing 'Almost Ready' instead of 'Work Ready' even with all mandatory items verified
bug_fix_applied.root_cause: nmc_registration was included in WORK_READY_REQUIREMENTS base set, causing 9 items to be required instead of 8 for non-nurses
bug_fix_applied.fix: Removed nmc_registration from WORK_READY_REQUIREMENTS. It's now only added dynamically for nurses via get_work_ready_items_for_role()
